title: Puncher (Rift)
body:
![puncher](https://github.com/shizotoaster/puncher-java/assets/51480483/0cd47333-7b2c-4ab4-b31d-c7f45aac11f7)
# Puncher Java
Simple ~~Fabric and Forge~~ Rift mod to pick up your boats and minecarts faster: Shift + LMB to break them. Custom boats / minecarts compatible!\
\
Showcase video:\
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=69zw4J0mF1Y \
\
\
This mod is also available for Bedrock Edition [Link](https://modbay.org/mods/1001-puncher.html) and modern Java Edition [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/puncher)
